pr_summary: Add bulk user fetch and fix password reset.
verdict_reason: The diff contains high-risk findings that should be fixed before merge.

findings.line_content: await db.query('UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE email = ?',
findings.title: Password update stores un-hashed password input
findings.description: The password update writes password input without evidence of hashing.
findings.suggestion: Hash passwords with bcrypt or argon2 before storing them.

findings.title: Missing query parameter validation
findings.description: The code calls a string method on query input without a type check.
findings.suggestion: Validate the query parameter exists and is a string before parsing it.

findings.title: Await inside loop serializes independent work
findings.description: Awaiting inside the loop makes independent operations run one after another instead of concurrently.
findings.suggestion: Use Promise.all or a bounded concurrency helper for independent work.

findings.title: N+1 query in loop
findings.description: The loop performs a data lookup per item, which creates N database or repository calls for N inputs.
findings.suggestion: Batch the lookup with an IN query or equivalent bulk API.

findings.title: Authorization check missing for sensitive operation
findings.description: The code performs a sensitive mutation without a visible ownership, role, or token validation check.
findings.suggestion: Check that the authenticated caller is allowed to perform this operation before changing state.

findings.title: Missing result handling
findings.description: The code uses the first result without checking whether a row exists.
findings.suggestion: Handle missing rows explicitly before adding them to the response.

findings.title: Undefined related-record lookup in enrichment
findings.description: The enrichment references a related-record lookup that is not declared in the local scope, which can throw and often points to missing batch-loading.
findings.suggestion: Load related records explicitly and key them by ID before enrichment.

positive_observations: The diff is small enough for a focused javascript line-level review.
The changes are organized around clear functions, which makes targeted fixes straightforward.
